headline: Q4 Research Tools & Consumables Earnings: Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) Earns Top Marks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at research tools & consumables stocks, starting with Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH).
